languages.text: {n}Эоганн басовито и недобро смеется.{/n} "Мнящий себя великим мыслителем перешел с интенсивных методов на экстенсивные, но тем самым лишь умножил свою некомпетентность. Истинная ирония судьбы".

{n}Eogunn lets out a deep, malevolent chuckle.{/n} "He who deems himself a great thinker has transitioned from intensive practices to extensive ones, only to propagate his own incompetence. A true irony of fate."
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн басовито и недобро смеется.{/n} "Мнящий себя великим мыслителем перешел с интенсивных методов на экстенсивные, но тем самым лишь умножил свою некомпетентность. Истинная ирония судьбы".

{n}Eogunn lets out a deep, malevolent chuckle.{/n} "He who deems himself a great thinker has transitioned from intensive practices to extensive ones, only to propagate his own incompetence. A true irony of fate."

{n}Eogunn lets out a deep, malevolent chuckle.{/n} "He who deems himself a great thinker has transitioned from intensive practices to extensive ones, only to propagate his own incompetence. A true irony of fate."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn suelta una risa grave y maligna.{/n} «El que dice ser un gran pensador ha pasado de prácticas complejas a una tarea extensa que solo propaga su incompetencia. EN verdad, el destino es irónico».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn lets out a deep, malevolent chuckle.{/n} "He who deems himself a great thinker has transitioned from intensive practices to extensive ones, only to propagate his own incompetence. A true irony of fate."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn suelta una risa grave y maligna.{/n} «El que dice ser un gran pensador ha pasado de prácticas complejas a una tarea extensa que solo propaga su incompetencia. EN verdad, el destino es irónico».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡发出一阵低沉而阴冷的笑声。{/n}“一个自诩伟大思想家的人，从精益求精的实践转向了盲目扩张，结果只是放大了他自身的无能。真是命运的讽刺。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn lets out a deep, malevolent chuckle.{/n} "He who deems himself a great thinker has transitioned from intensive practices to extensive ones, only to propagate his own incompetence. A true irony of fate."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡发出一阵低沉而阴冷的笑声。{/n}“一个自诩伟大思想家的人，从精益求精的实践转向了盲目扩张，结果只是放大了他自身的无能。真是命运的讽刺。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn stößt ein tiefes, bösartiges Lachen aus.{/n} "Er, der sich selbst für einen großen Denker hält, hat von intensiven zu extensiven Praktiken gewechselt, nur, um seine eigene Inkompetenz zu propagieren. Eine wahre Ironie des Schicksals."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn lets out a deep, malevolent chuckle.{/n} "He who deems himself a great thinker has transitioned from intensive practices to extensive ones, only to propagate his own incompetence. A true irony of fate."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn stößt ein tiefes, bösartiges Lachen aus.{/n} "Er, der sich selbst für einen großen Denker hält, hat von intensiven zu extensiven Praktiken gewechselt, nur, um seine eigene Inkompetenz zu propagieren. Eine wahre Ironie des Schicksals."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn laisse échapper un ricanement rauque et cynique.{/n} « Celui qui se prend pour un grand penseur est passé de pratiques intensives à des pratiques extensives, avec pour seul résultat de démultiplier sa propre incompétence. L'ironie du sort dans toute sa splendeur ! »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn lets out a deep, malevolent chuckle.{/n} "He who deems himself a great thinker has transitioned from intensive practices to extensive ones, only to propagate his own incompetence. A true irony of fate."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn laisse échapper un ricanement rauque et cynique.{/n} « Celui qui se prend pour un grand penseur est passé de pratiques intensives à des pratiques extensives, avec pour seul résultat de démultiplier sa propre incompétence. L'ironie du sort dans toute sa splendeur ! »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn derin, kötücül bir kıkırdama koyveriyor.{/n} "Kendini büyük bir düşünür sanan kişi, kendi beceriksizliğini çoğaltmak için yoğun uygulamalardan yaygın uygulamalara geçiş yapmış. Kaderin gerçek bir cilvesi."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn lets out a deep, malevolent chuckle.{/n} "He who deems himself a great thinker has transitioned from intensive practices to extensive ones, only to propagate his own incompetence. A true irony of fate."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn derin, kötücül bir kıkırdama koyveriyor.{/n} "Kendini büyük bir düşünür sanan kişi, kendi beceriksizliğini çoğaltmak için yoğun uygulamalardan yaygın uygulamalara geçiş yapmış. Kaderin gerçek bir cilvesi."

languages.text: {n}エオグンは深い悪意に満ちた笑いを漏らした。{/n}「自分こそ偉大な思想家だと考える者は、厳しい修行から広範囲な修行へと移行し、自分の無能さを広めるだけである。運命の皮肉である。」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn lets out a deep, malevolent chuckle.{/n} "He who deems himself a great thinker has transitioned from intensive practices to extensive ones, only to propagate his own incompetence. A true irony of fate."

traits.locale_text: {n}エオグンは深い悪意に満ちた笑いを漏らした。{/n}「自分こそ偉大な思想家だと考える者は、厳しい修行から広範囲な修行へと移行し、自分の無能さを広めるだけである。運命の皮肉である。」
